title: Add stall watchdog for background bash tasks (parity with CC LocalShellTask startStallWatchdog)
description:
## Gap

CC's LocalShellTask.tsx (line 221) calls startStallWatchdog(taskId, description, kind, toolUseId, agentId) for each background task. The watchdog fires a user notification when the background process produces no output for a configurable interval (stall timeout), alerting the user that the task may be hung.

OC has no stall detection. Background shells run indefinitely without producing any signal to the caller when they stop producing output. The only way to discover a stalled process is to poll bash_output and observe no new output.

## Parity reference
- CC: tasks/LocalShellTask/LocalShellTask.tsx:221 (startStallWatchdog)
- OC: missing — src/tools/bash/mod.rs BackgroundShellManager has no watchdog

## Acceptance
- Per-shell stall timeout configurable (or sensible default)
- When background shell produces no new stdout/stderr for the timeout period, emit a notification
- Notification surfaced via the tool response on the next bash_output call or via a push channel
